Darrion Williams

Position: Forward

6-6, 210lb (198cm, 95kg)

Hometown: Las Vegas, NV

High School: Bishop Gorman (NV)

Schools: Nevada (Men), Texas Tech (Men) and NC State (Men)

  • 2024-25 NCAA All-Region
  • 2x All-Big 12
  • 2022-23 MWC ROY
+2
